chat_template.notes: tokenizer_config.json contains a chat_template; metadata only, no tokenizer vocabulary or tokenizer model files were downloaded.

memory.notes: 4.0B bfloat16 model metadata; README warns to reduce context length, for example to 32768, if out-of-memory occurs. No runtime memory probe was executed.

quantization.notes: No quantized artifacts were fetched. vLLM/SGLang serving compatibility is documented by the model card, but quantization choice remains trainer/serving-runner owned.

serving.notes: Model card documents SGLang and vLLM commands with 262144 context length. No serving process was launched.

structured_outputs.notes: Structured-output behavior is not explicitly verified by metadata. Treat as unsupported until a serving/tool parser receipt proves it.

tokenizer.notes: tokenizer_config.json metadata was reviewed; tokenizer vocabulary/model payloads were not downloaded.

tool_calls.notes: Model card Agentic Use section says Qwen3 excels in tool calling and recommends Qwen-Agent; tokenizer_config.json includes tool-call chat template metadata. No runtime tool-call probe was executed.
